**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the epic aviation rhapsody deconstruction and the '3-person model aircraft/drone workshop' physical demotion probe. This enterprise, named 'Huahangyi Aircraft Technology,' has a business license that is a sci-fi masterpiece challenging the history of human aviation: it builds everything from 'light and small helicopters and airplanes' all the way to 'watercraft, flying cars, multi-amphibious aircraft,' and even intends to manufacture 'aero engines.' The official big data system unsurprisingly sent it to the altar of 'Railway, Ship, Aerospace Manufacturing.' However, the forensic logic engine directly intercepted its vital flaw: the insured headcount is a pitiful 3 people! The paid-in capital is 1.225 million. The logical deduction instantly turned into an extremely absurd stand-up comedy: in a small workshop or office in the Jiangning Binjiang Development Zone, the boss and 2 buddies, with around a million in their pockets (a sum not even enough to R&D a single turbine blade of an aircraft engine), claim to have built a super military-industrial complex assembly line capable of simultaneously mass-producing helicopters, flying cars, and aero engines? This is no longer writing a business license; this is writing a script for The Avengers. The probe mercilessly shattered all delusional vocabulary regarding 'manned aircraft and engines,' extracting what these 3 people can actually manage under a 1M+ budget: 'unmanned aerial vehicles (i.e., civilian/commercial drones or model aircraft), rotor blade processing, software R&D.' The truth is extremely hardcore and smells of glue: this is a 100% pure 3-Employee Drone/RC Model Assembly & Design Workshop. The boss is highly likely a model aircraft enthusiast or drone flight control engineer, leading two apprentices, buying carbon fiber tubes, motors, and flight control boards to assemble DJI-level commercial drones (like crop dusters, aerial survey drones) in the workshop, or drawing blueprints to have rotor blades sub-contracted. The official grand 'aerospace manufacturing giant' tag is the most thorough dimensional mockery of its true identity.
